parsed_profile.arc_function: Initialize protagonist-transmigration into game-mechanic world; establish sect-survival stakes; deliver system-tutorial payoff through quest-chain completion; plant cultivation-advantage seeds against overwhelming external threats
parsed_profile.dominant_engine: Sect-Building System (gamified leadership management with quest rewards, territory confirmation, blood-binding mechanics)

data_completeness.data_availability_note: Only Volume 1 (chapters 1-25) contains extractable story content. Volumes 2-18 returned LLM fallback stubs with zero confidence. Design card reflects known mechanics from Volume 1 only; future volumes undetermined.

reader_promise.core_promise: Protagonist inherits doomed organization in hostile world; through game-breaking system advantage, achieves competence and survival against overwhelming odds
reader_promise.delivery_mechanism: System tutorial payoff via multi-step quest completion; hidden cultivation advantage creates dramatic irony; underdog position invites investment in systematic competence gain
satisfaction_hooks: system mystery activation in opening chapter

core_engine.game_mechanic_exposition: System mechanics delivered through transparent interface description rather than narrator exposition; status-panel visuals provide diegetic system explanation; quest chains use checklist framing to simulate game UI

risk_patterns: {'structural_risks': ['heavy_system_explanation_through_internal_monologue_may_slow_pacing', 'quest_completion_checklist_format_risks_feeling_like_mechanical_enumeration', 'protagonist_alone_receives_game_breaking_advantage_without_immediate_conflict_pressure', 'dependence_on_game_mechanic_satisfaction_for_reader_engagement'], 'competence_gap_risks': ['protagonist_significantly_weaker_than_every_antagonist (ongoing)', 'protagonist_cultivation_insufficient_for_stated_task', 'protagonist_lacks_combat_capability'], 'resource_risks': ['organization_cannot_afford_basic_tools', 'multiple_external_powers_hostile'], 'unknown_risks_note': 'Risk patterns derived from Volume 1 only. Volumes 2-18 content unavailable; additional risk patterns may emerge in unprocessed material.'}

craft_profile.prose_tendencies: System mechanics delivered through transparent interface description rather than narrator exposition; status-panel visuals provide diegetic system explanation; quest chains use checklist framing to simulate game UI; blood-binding ritual employs sensory specificity (drip blood, spiritual connection) for tactile engagement
craft_profile.tension_strategy: Power imbalance established through public humiliation scene; survival stakes defined by three-year deadline against insufficient resources; protagonist's hidden advantage creates dramatic irony while remaining concealed from antagonists
craft_profile.reader_investment_mechanics: System activation mystery in chapter 1 pays off with interactive tutorial in chapter 2; underdog position invites reader to root for system-assisted competence gain; newbie_package creates immediate reward anticipation; unestablished slots create constructive anticipation for future content
